Creator Login Brand Login Get Started

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 8, 2026

Creatorship, LLC ("Creatorship," "we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform at creatorship.app and related services (the "Platform").

1. Information We Collect

1.1 Information You Provide

Data TypeExamplesPurpose
Account InformationName, email address, password (hashed)Account creation and authentication
Brand ProfileBrand name, store name, store URLPlatform functionality and creator matching
Payment InformationCredit card details (via Stripe — we never store card numbers)Billing and payout processing
Contact InformationName, email, message content submitted via contact formCustomer support and inquiries
Creator ProfileTikTok display name, follower count, video countPlatform functionality and brand matching

1.2 Information from Third-Party Services

When you connect third-party accounts, we receive information from those services:

  • Meta (Facebook/Instagram): Ad account IDs, page IDs, campaign performance data (spend, impressions, clicks, conversions), and OAuth tokens. We use this to create and manage ad campaigns on your behalf.
  • TikTok: Display name, follower count, video count, and OAuth tokens. We use this for creator identity verification and content discovery.
  • Stripe: Payment status, subscription information, and payout data. We never receive or store your full credit card number.

1.3 Information Collected Automatically

When you access the Platform, we may automatically collect:

  • IP address and general location (country/region level)
  • Browser type, device type, and operating system
  • Pages visited, features used, and time spent on the Platform
  • Referring URL and search terms

2. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

  • Provide, maintain, and improve the Platform
  • Create and manage your account
  • Process transactions and send related notices (invoices, receipts, payment confirmations)
  • Facilitate ad campaign creation and management on Meta platforms
  • Match brands with relevant creator content
  • Process creator payouts via Stripe Connect
  • Send service-related communications (welcome emails, campaign notifications, billing alerts)
  • Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
  • Detect, prevent, and address fraud, security issues, and technical problems
  • Comply with legal obligations

3. How We Share Your Information

We do not sell your personal information. We may share information in the following circumstances:

  • Service Providers: We share data with third-party services that help us operate the Platform, including Stripe (payments), Meta (advertising), and our hosting provider (Railway). These providers are bound by contractual obligations to protect your data.
  • Brand-Creator Matching: When a brand discovers creator content through the Platform, limited creator information (TikTok handle, video metrics) is shared to facilitate licensing. We do not share creator contact information or private account details with brands.
  • Legal Requirements: We may disclose information if required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request.
  • Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of the transaction. We will notify you of any such change.
  • With Your Consent: We may share information for any other purpose with your explicit consent.

4. Data Security

We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including:

  • Passwords are salted and hashed using bcrypt (never stored in plaintext)
  • All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS
  • API tokens and secrets are stored as environment variables, not in source code
  • Payment processing is handled entirely by Stripe (PCI-DSS compliant) — we never store credit card numbers
  • OAuth tokens are stored server-side and never exposed to the frontend

While we strive to protect your information, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

5. Data Retention

We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. Specifically:

  • Account data: Retained until you delete your account
  • Campaign data: Retained for 24 months after campaign completion for reporting purposes
  • Transaction records: Retained for 7 years as required for tax and financial compliance
  • Contact form submissions: Retained for 12 months

You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting privacy@creatorship.app or using the "Delete Account" feature in Settings.

6. Your Privacy Rights

6.1 All Users

Regardless of your location, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you
  • Correct inaccurate personal information
  • Delete your account and personal information
  • Disconnect third-party integrations at any time
  • Opt out of non-essential communications

6.2 California Residents (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act:

  • Right to know what personal information is collected, used, and shared
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

To exercise these rights, contact privacy@creatorship.app. We will respond within 45 days.

6.3 European/UK Residents (GDPR)

If you are in the European Economic Area or United Kingdom, your rights include:

  • Right of access, rectification, and erasure
  • Right to restrict or object to processing
  • Right to data portability
  • Right to withdraw consent at any time
  • Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

Our legal basis for processing is: (a) performance of our contract with you; (b) our legitimate business interests; and (c) your consent where applicable.

7. Cookies and Tracking

The Platform uses essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking. Analytics data is collected at the server level and does not involve client-side tracking scripts.

8. Children's Privacy

The Platform is not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under 18, we will take steps to delete that information promptly. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact privacy@creatorship.app.

9. International Data Transfers

Your information may be transferred to and processed in the United States, where our servers are located. By using the Platform, you consent to the transfer of your information to the United States. We will take reasonable steps to ensure your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or by posting a prominent notice on the Platform. Your continued use after the effective date of a revised policy constitutes acceptance of the changes.

11. Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights:

Creatorship, LLC
Greenville, South Carolina
Email: privacy@creatorship.app
General: contact@creatorship.app
